Further financial details...

Synopsis

A family on a tropical holiday discover that the secluded beach where they are relaxing for a few hours is somehow causing them to age rapidly … reducing their entire lives into a single day.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,854,735 (34.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.86 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,355 opening theaters/3,379 max. theaters, 5.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $56,773,558

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 23rd, 2021 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: July 21st, 2021 (Wide) (Finland)

July 21st, 2021 (Wide) (France)
July 22nd, 2021 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: October 5th, 2021 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong violence, disturbing images, suggestive content, partial nudity and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2685 (cert #53247), 6/16/2021)
Running Time: 108 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Same Role, Multiple Actors

Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
